title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music playlist or streaming service created and curated by musicians. It is designed to provide ambient music for thinking and building activities.
writeup: Claude FM presents a music playlist curated by musicians, built to accompany thinking and building work. The selection is ambient, intended as background for focused activity rather than active listening. The takeaway is straightforward: it is a streaming offering from Claude positioned for concentration during creative and technical tasks.
